manifest.name: Sindri Aurora
manifest.description: A deep purple and teal dark theme for Sindri IDE.

readmeContent:
# Sindri Aurora

A deep purple and teal dark theme for Sindri IDE.

- **Accent:** Violet `#B06CFF`
- **Strings / literals:** Teal `#00D4B4`
- **Keywords:** Soft lavender `#C490FF`
- **Background:** Deep ink `#0B0A18`

Designed for long sessions — high contrast where you need it, muted chrome around it.

manifest.name: Sindri Neon Icons
manifest.description: Vibrant neon file icon theme — bold language-brand glyphs on dark backgrounds.

readmeContent:
# Sindri Neon Icons

A vibrant neon file icon theme for Sindri IDE.

Language icons use bold label glyphs with saturated language-brand colours on dark backgrounds — easy to scan at a glance in the file tree.

**Covers:** JS · TS · JSX · TSX · Python · Rust · Go · JSON · TOML · YAML · Markdown · CSS · SCSS · HTML · SVG · Shell · lock · .env · git

manifest.name: Sindri UI Icons
manifest.description: The default Sindri activity bar and toolbar icon set, available as a standalone extension.

readmeContent:
# Sindri UI Icons

The default Sindri activity bar and toolbar icon set, published as a standalone extension.

SVG sources live in `icons/`. Icon IDs map to tool-window identifiers: `explorer`, `search`, `git`, `debug`, `extensions`, `terminal`, `problems`, `output`, `settings`, and more.

**Status:** Data-only — installs without the extension host.

manifest.name: Rust Language Support
manifest.description: Rust language support — syntax highlighting, rust-analyzer LSP, and LLDB debugger.

readmeContent:
# Rust Language Support

Full Rust development support for Sindri IDE.

- **Syntax** — Tree-sitter grammar (`tree-sitter-rust`)
- **LSP** — rust-analyzer (hover, completions, diagnostics, go-to-definition)
- **DAP** — LLDB debugger integration

> **Status:** Scaffolded — requires the Sindri extension host (in development).

manifest.name: English (United States)
manifest.description: English (US) localisation pack — the canonical reference locale for Sindri IDE.

readmeContent:
# English (United States)

The canonical reference locale for Sindri IDE.

This extension serves as both the default localisation pack and the authoritative source of UI string keys for translators creating other locale packs.

> **Status:** Scaffolded — requires the Sindri extension host and localisation API (in development).

manifest.name: Cargo Test Adapter
manifest.description: Cargo test runner adapter — discover, run, and display Rust test results inline.

readmeContent:
# Cargo Test Adapter

Integrates `cargo test` into the Sindri test runner.

- Discovers tests via `cargo test -- --list`
- Runs individual tests or the full suite
- Streams output and maps failures to source locations

> **Status:** Scaffolded — requires the Sindri extension host (in development).

manifest.name: Sindri Minimap
manifest.description: Adds a minimap (code overview) panel to the right edge of each editor.

readmeContent:
# Sindri Minimap

Adds a scaled-down code overview panel to the right edge of each editor pane.

- Renders a pixel-perfect minimap of the current file
- Click to jump to any position
- Highlights the visible viewport region
- Respects the active colour theme

> **Status:** Scaffolded — requires the Sindri extension host (in development).
